run_summary.summary: Confirming earlier scan findings. JLab March campaign payment is 5 days overdue ($2k, due 4/20) — JLab had wrong email for the registration form. Mariah says form + payment are coming, but adding a note directly to the JLab card so it doesn't fall through the cracks. Previous runs covered Sherwin Williams spray paint (new deal, negotiation), Flexsteel Popfly application (must apply by Mon 4/27), Aleve content approval, and Smart Solar active editing.

suggestions.message: Reminder: Popfly application deadline is TOMORROW (Mon 4/27). Has Kenny applied yet? Ian can't keep extending this.
JLab March $2k payment is now 5 days overdue. Per Mariah: registration form was sent to wrong email, resending + payment should follow. Check if the form arrived and when to expect payment.

deals.notes: [Apr 24]: March campaign payment overdue — was due 4/20 ($2k, now 5 days late). JLab had wrong email for registration form. Per campaign manager Mariah: form + payment should be coming soon. Confirm this has been received.
deals.activity_note: Apr 24: JLab March $2k payment overdue (due 4/20) — registration form sent to wrong email. Flagging so it doesn't get lost.
